prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document provides information relevant to the physical and mental health support for asylum seekers in the UK, specifically highlighting the role of the NHS, which primarily operates within England, but also acknowledges the decentralized health services in Scotland, Wales, and Northern Ireland.
